title: aira tenorei var. intermedia
intro: Aira tenorei var. intermedia, also known as intermediate hair grass or Italian hair grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Europe, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Aira tenorei var. intermedia is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, making it a potential treatment for coughs and colds. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
